mapper.sql: AUTH_ID, MENU_ID, IS_AVAILABLE, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3
mapper.select:
select
distinct
'true' as QUERYID,
from TBL_MENU_AUTH
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into TBL_MENU_AUTH (AUTH_ID, MENU_ID, IS_AVAILABLE, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3) values (#{authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{menuId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into TBL_MENU_AUTH
AUTH_ID,
MENU_ID,
IS_AVAILABLE,
CREATE_TIME,
CREATE_BY,
UPDATE_TIME,
UPDATE_BY,
RESERVED_FIELD1,
RESERVED_FIELD2,
RESERVED_FIELD3,
#{authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{menuId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update TBL_MENU_AUTH
AUTH_ID = #{record.authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MENU_ID = #{record.menuId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_AVAILABLE = #{record.isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATE_TIME = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CREATE_BY = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_BY = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{record.reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{record.reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{record.reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update TBL_MENU_AUTH set AUTH_ID = #{record.authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MENU_ID = #{record.menuId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_AVAILABLE = #{record.isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREATE_TIME = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CREATE_BY = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_BY = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{record.reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{record.reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{record.reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update TBL_MENU_AUTH
IS_AVAILABLE = #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATE_TIME = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CREATE_BY = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where AUTH_ID = #{authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and MENU_ID = #{menuId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update TBL_MENU_AUTH set IS_AVAILABLE = #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREATE_TIME = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CREATE_BY = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where AUTH_ID = #{authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and MENU_ID = #{menuId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
